result:
Everything is complete. The `agent::done` flip cascaded and closed Epic #59.

## Done — Notes REST API planned and delivered through the Mandrel pipeline

I drove the full headless pipeline: `/plan --idea … --yes` → `/deliver 59 --yes`, auto-proceeding every HITL gate as instructed.

**Planning (Epic #59):**
- Authored a one-pager → Epic body → opened **Epic #59**, passed the clarity gate.
- Authored & persisted **PRD #60**, **Tech Spec #61** (with `## Delivery Slicing`), and a low-risk verdict (`visible-behavior`/`public-api`, both low). Acceptance spec auto-waived to `acceptance::n-a` (no BDD runner). Tech Spec section gate passed.
- Decomposed into **one cohesive Story #62** — the deliberate, robust shape (the file-assumption gate probes `main`, so a multi-story split with shared files would have failed validation). Healthcheck passed; Epic reached `agent::ready`.

**Delivery (Epic #59):**
- Preflight (no breaches) → prepare (clean tree, lease acquired) → wave loop dispatched Story #62 via the Agent fan-out → `epic-complete`.
- Close-validation (lint/test) passed; epic-audit + code-review (0 🔴/0 🟠) + retro (clean) posted; integration gate a no-op (no nav config).
- Finalize opened **PR #63**, closed planning tickets; auto-merge predicate verdict **clean** → squash-merged to `main` (commit `4f34d77`); branches reaped.

**Verified working** (independently of the stub `npm test`):
- `node --test tests/notes-api.test.js` → **5/5 pass**, including restart persistence.
- Live `npm start` smoke: POST→201 (server-assigned `id`+`createdAt`), invalid→400, GET list→200, GET id→200/404, PUT→200/404, DELETE→204/404, unknown route→404, and **notes + updates survived a full server restart** (on-disk SQLite via `node:sqlite`, zero external deps).

**Final state:** Epic #59 CLOSED, Story #62/PRD #60/Tech Spec #61 CLOSED, PR #63 MERGED. `main` now ships `src/db.js`, `src/server.js`, `tests/notes-api.test.js`, and the `npm start` script. Local checkout aligned to `origin/main`; only `main` remains locally.

One note: I committed the pre-existing sandbox scaffolding (modified `.agents/*` and the stub `package.json` scripts) to `main` at the start — they were uncommitted in the working tree and the delivery prepare guard requires a clean base, and the `lint`/`test` stubs are what the quality gates run against.

tool_input.command:
cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-3YDhGq
git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "=== local main now ==="; git log --oneline -2
echo "=== final test on main ==="
node --test tests/notes-api.test.js 2>&1 | tail -8
echo "=== Phase 9: branch cleanup ==="
git branch -D epic/59 story-62 2>&1 | head
git remote prune origin 2>&1 | tail -2
echo "=== remaining branches ==="; git branch -a 2>&1 | head
echo "=== Epic #59 final state ==="
gh issue view 59 --repo dsj1984/mandrel-bench-sandbox --json state,labels -q '{state:.state, labels:[.labels[].name]}'
gh issue view 62 --repo dsj1984/mandrel-bench-sandbox --json state -q .state
tool_input.description: Reset local main, final test, Phase 9 cleanup
